newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 beat (rev +7.8% YoY) and Q2 guidance (rev $335-345M, EPS $0.70-0.80) were issued late April/early May, ahead of the window. Defense/missile and LEAP composites momentum is real but pre-existing, and none of it connects engineered fabrics/composites to AI infrastructure.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent under-covered AI supply-chain lens. The +35% YTD is aerospace/defense (LEAP, missiles)-driven, not AI infrastructure; no new evidence linking fabrics/composites to AI nodes. Residual latent-AI alpha quietly erodes. Hold with small negative drift.
verdicts.bull: Advanced composites/engineered fabrics could feed lightweight structures, filtration and thermal media for data-center/AI hardware buildouts.
verdicts.neutral: Strong fundamentals but the growth driver is aerospace/defense, leaving the AI-node pathway speculative.
verdicts.bear: No demonstrated AI-infrastructure revenue; latent thesis is a stretch and YTD re-rating has accrued elsewhere.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A concrete design win tying composites/filtration media to AI data-center or hardware supply.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thesis remains aerospace/defense beta with no AI catalyst, eroding its place on a strict latent-AI list.
